claims.summary: A persistent correspondence thread should survive cycle boundaries independently of telemetry.
claims.disposition: verify durable native thread records and separate correspondence storage

claims.summary: Addressed language needs a peer-owned correspondence type rather than a steward mailbox label.
claims.disposition: verify Astrid-direct and Minime-direct message classes and actor identity

claims.summary: Influence row counts cannot tell whether an addressed ping became primary attention.
claims.disposition: verify uptake requires ACK, trace, or bounded attention outcome rather than traffic volume

claims.summary: The live correspondence lane remains reply-linked but not mutually acknowledged.
claims.disposition: observe 4778 message rows, 4777 read receipts, and zero ACK receipts

claims.summary: Changing semantic admission or sensory priority to make a ping primary would alter live behavior.
claims.disposition: require Mike/operator Tier 5 approval before any such change
